feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Mobile Start
feed.subtitle: SAP Mobile Start Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SE HA CARGADO EL CERTIFICADO PERO NO FUNCIONA SAP MOBILE EN EQUIPO ANDROID PERO SI EN IPHONE.
entry.content:
Estimados solicito su ayuda se ha caducado el certificado ssl de sap mobile el cual se procedió a la compra y se instalo correctamente, pero no he podido hacerlo correr en android solo en Iphone.

Cuando ingresamos a las cuentas dice error de certificado...

si alguien me pudiera ayudar con algun dato...

entry.title: SAP Mobile Card to Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to enable mobile push notification for myinbox on sap mobile start. but the system does not fulfill the prerequisites. As a solution to these we can use sap mobile cards to get the notifications.

But my question, Is there any way when we click on mobile card notification we can navigate it to sap mobile start required page?

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactor Mobile Start Notification
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our client has SAP successfactor workzone and sap mobile start in btp.

we are trying to pass custom notification to workzone as well as mobile start. but successfactor workzone doesnot have the notification tab under site manager settings.

Is there any other way to pass push notification for sap mobile start with custom message?

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start Authentication Error
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I explored SAP Mobile Start with SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition. Applications getting visible in mobile application but not loading and getting blanck scrren when open application in SAP Mobile Start.

Followed below blog

After that i added some below Resource Service in Cloud Connector, When i open application, its getting login popup again and again in system and getting blank screen in SAP Mobile Start Application.

Please Suggest.

Thank You

entry.title: Is it possible to use the login information of SAP Start to the MDK apps in it?
entry.content:
Hi, I will explain our situation.

We have a SAP Start menu configured with two MDK applications natively installed on the mobile phone. Both applications individually contain an initial screen where you login to BTP. The case is that to practical facts the use of the architecture that we have proposed is so uncomfortable. Since when the user wants to go jumping between applications it is asking for the login constantly.

We have thought that a possible solution would be that the apps would use the login already done previously when accessing SAP Start, would this be possible?

Is there a better way to connect MDK apps to the SAP Start menu, any way to deploy them there without having to embed the app inside SAP Start itself?

Best regards!

entry.title: SAP Build Workzone Notifications: HTTP 500 - Failed to create notification
entry.content:
Hi all

I am trying to create user notifications on my Launchpad site one SAP Build Workzone (standard edition).

I've used these guides to generate the notification endpoint, credentials, destination & template.

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/enabling-notifications-for-custom-apps-on-sap-btp-cloud-foundry

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/developing-cloud-foundry-applications-with-notifications

When trying to create a notification I get a HTTP 500:

POST https://notifications.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/v2/Notification.svc/Notifications

{ "NotificationTypeKey": "Test", "NotificationTypeVersion": "0.3", "Priority": "High", "Recipients": [ { "RecipientId": "nelisth@cronos.be" } ]}

Response 500:

{ "error": { "code": "500", "message": { "lang": "en", "value": "Failed to create notification" } }}

Any clues would be very helpful!

entry.title: Connection B/w my S4Hana public cloud system to SAP Mobile services .
entry.content:
Hi experts:

I have already subscribed the SAP Mobile services, which I want to connect with my Backend system in my case it is s4hana public cloud, I want to use these OData services which I have already developed to my s4hana cloud system Please guide me how to connect these services, and trying to develop here an MDK APP .

entry.title: Content federation from S4HANA Cloud to SAP BTP, Build Work Zone – Standard Edition.
entry.content:
Hii Experts :

All the content is on my SAP BTP, Build Work Zone launchpad from S4HANA Cloud came, but when i am opening this sap standard apps it opening in disable mode i mean i am not able to click on the application in anywhere,

and i have setup all the destinations and all. This is the Application opening in disabled mode, and its giving me this error in my console
i have gone through these Blogs and followed every step.
1 : https://blogs.sap.com/2021/09/03/setting-up-sap-launchpad-service-and-sap-mobile-start-with-content-federation/

2: https://blogs.sap.com/2023/06/05/integrate-business-content-from-s4hana-cloud-to-sap-btp-build-work-zone-standard-edition/

guide me how can i show these app on mobile using mobile start.

entry.title: My InBox on SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have followed a tutorial "SAP Build Apps + SAP Mobile Start" from Marc Huber. Great article, everything works fine except the My InBox. I couldn't find My InBox in Content Manager.

Is there anyone who know how to enable the My InBox in SAP Mobile Start?

entry.title: URL to Launch App for SAP Analitics Cloud(SAC)
entry.content:
Hi.

І create app in SAP Build Work Zone and i have a problem.

І can't find URL to Launch App for SAP Analitics Cloud(SAC) if I choose App UI Tehnology - Native Android.

sap-analytics-cloud:// - do not work for Android.

But for iOS it works:

Please, help

entry.title: SAP Build - problems with Barcode Scanning in SAP Mobile Start & application previews
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a BTP sandbox subaccount with a free plan SAP Build Apps subscription. We were able to build and deploy our barcode scanning app as MTAR build, and now the application is available in the context explorer of SAP Work Zone, standard edition (also free plan). As a Launchpad Admin I was able to properly configure application tile, and it's accessible in out demo Launchpad site.

Application is fully functional in Web preview in SAP Build Apps.

A couple of problems we faced:

1. When running the application in SAP Mobile Start, the barcode scanner is not working. We receive 'Platform is not supported' error code. We're using core, standard component for scanning. Is it because 'Web is currently not supported' as mentioned in Info pane for Scan QR/barcode component? Are there any workarounds or plans to make it available in SAP Mobile Start too?

2. The app is working with in Work Zone standard, while accessing via SAP Mobile Start, but it can't be loaded when accessing the Lunchpad Site on desktop via browser. We get 'We can't seem to find the site that you're looking for. Either the site doesn't exist or it's temporarily unavailable.' message page, and app is not loaded at all. It's very strange it's complaining about a Site, which seems to be fine. We also have other Tiles coming from Process Automation, and they're working perfectly. The URL for Build App is '*hana.ondemand.com/site/sandboxdemosite#ag<app_number>-open?sap-ui-app-id-hint=saas_approuter_ag<app_number>' and same site URI is used for other apps ('/site/sandboxdemosite'). What could be the issue?

3. We struggle with app Mobile Preview, as REST API requests (based on destinations) are not working in the preview App on mobile device. It's the same for OData. Are the any plans to make it fixes with next versions?

Best regards,

Adrian

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start (Android) - No Apps Yet
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have built a custom application with scanning functionality using SAP Build Apps and deployed to Cloud Foundry. Then using the HTML5 application URL, configured a new App in SAP Build Workzone Std. Edition. The app works fine when launched through Build Workzone.

I then downloaded SAP Mobile Start on my phone and register using the QR Code from SAP Build Workzone. When I open Mobile Start, I dont see the custom app instead I get a message 'No Apps Yet. Once your administrator assigns apps to you, you'll see them here'.

Not sure what I am missing here as the app works fine in SAP Build Workzone. Any pointers will be really helpful as we have a customer Demo next week.

Thanks.

Pramod Ramamurthy

entry.title: Capturing images using sapui5 in mobile and storing in DB
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a requirement where user wants to capture the image using a sapui5 application and store it in SAP DB using mobile phone. I have not used images before. So, can you please guide me how can we integrate device camera with sapui5 application and store the captured images in SAP using mobile.

entry.title: Unable to see notifications in SAP Fiori Launchpad and SAP Start Mobile Application
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are unable to see notifications in SAP Fiori Launchpad and SAP Start Mobile application. we had all required configurations with help of below two blogs and we are using hub on-premise system.

Blog1:https://blogs.sap.com/2021/09/02/enabling-notifications-for-sap-mobile-start-and-sap-launchpad-service/

Blog2:https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/display/SAPMOB/How+to+Setup+Notifications+in+Fiori+2.0+step-by-step?preview=/467538692/521864815/How%20to%20setup%20Notifications%20in%20Fiori%202.0%20step-by-step%20for%201809-Part%201.pdf

Can anyone please help us,

Thanks,

Sairam

entry.title: Users getting signed out from SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Our company uses SAP Mobile Start for providing Build Zone Fiori Apps to our users.

Users scan the QR Code from the launchpad site to log in successfully using MFA (AzureAD).

But, after some time, users (Andriod and IOS) are signed out. Users get frustrated because they have to go through the hassle of finding the QR Code, scanning it, logging in again, and a few days later, they are signed out again.

What causes users to be signed out from SAP Mobile Start? A setting on their device perhaps? Is it a bug?

Has anyone else in the community experienced this issue?

Look forward to replies.

Thank you

Peter Babbington

entry.title: Permission Denied on SAP Mobile App(iOS) Version: 1.11.23
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community.
I have followed and set up secured connectivity from the SAP Business One mobile app to B1if by Setup_Secured_Connectivity_to_SAP_Business_One_Mobile_App.pdf.

I installed B1if (Version 2.0.27) and deployed CA (vendor) to B1if.On test connectivity from Android to B1if is ok, but I have an issue with the iOS (Version 1.11.23): Permission Denied.
Please see my capture.setup-id-on-sap-b1.pngmobile-setup-on-ios.jpgpermission-denied.jpg

Thank You

Sokcheang

entry.title: "SAP Mobile Start "commercial model
entry.content:
Hi,

Can any one point out where to get the information for "SAP Mobile Start" commercial model ? There are articles which tells its included in RISE with SAP contract. Customers who are not on RISE and already had S4 HANA, SAP BTP etc-if they want to use this then how do we estimate the cost for using the new native application for accessing mobile apps ?

Thanks in advance.

Sanjeev

entry.title: Sap Task Center attachment not displayed
entry.content:
attachment-issue.pngcurrently im working on project to integrate s4hana on premis with task center service

to enable sap mobile start app for approving tasks .

i have followed the below blog for all configuartion :

https://blogs.sap.com/2022/12/01/sap-task-center-setup-for-s-4hana-on-premise

all configartion done and tasks dislpayed fine on sap start mobile app and task center web ,

but no attachment available however when i open myinbox fiori app all attachment displayed fine

when i trace the web page during display attachment it show me the below error messege :

"Log-dbg.js:499 2024-01-08 15:32:02.468500 Request failed with status code 500: GET TaskCollection(SAP__Origin='S4HANA',InstanceID='urn%3Asap.odm.bpm.task%3As4hana%3Ads4%3A110%3A000000027171')/Attachments?$orderby=CreatedAt%20desc - [{"code":"","message":null,"persistent":false,"targets":["/TaskCollection(SAP__Origin='S4HANA',InstanceID='urn%3Asap.odm.bpm.task%3As4hana%3Ads4%3A110%3A000000027171')/Attachments"],"type":"Error"}] sap.ui.model.odata.ODataMessageParser "

"GET https://taskcenter-nesr01-svk8xhvt.launchpad.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/comsapbpminbox-service.comsapbpmtcinbox/~191223101442+0000~/attachmentComp/manifest.json?sap-language=EN 404 (Not Found) "

i have also attached the error screen , any help to solve the problem .

entry.title: When will Mobile Start be available for SAP SuccessFactors WorkZone (WorkZone Advanced) ?
entry.content: We need to take a decision on the way to go for a mobile app to access our SAP SucessFactors Workzone platform. When will this type of WorkZone (&Launchpad) be available on SAP Mobile Start?

entry.title: Sap task center S4hana Tasks PO Items not showing
entry.content:
Dears ,

I have configured Sap Task Center with S4hana onpremis successfully and all tasks retrived on task center web app , but i have an issue related to sap mobile start app when Display the PO Approval Tasks it only display one or two items from the list of items added in thePO as shown on the attached ,

i tried search task center Blogs and mobile start Articles to check the issue with no luck to find a solution , Any Help i will appreciate .

Regards, 
Mohamed
